controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981
controls.control_description:
In this context, rural co-operative banks shall mean State Co-operative Banks
and Central Co-operative Banks, as defined in the National Bank for
Agriculture and Rural Development Act, 1981.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the requirements of the state co-operative societies acts and / or rules made thereunder, or other statutory enactments
controls.control_description:
A bank shall follow the requirements of the State Co-operative Societies Acts and
/ or rules made thereunder, or other statutory enactments, if they are more
stringent than those prescribed hereby.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the requirements of the state co-operative societies acts and / or rules made thereunder, or other statutory enactments

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning assigned to them below: <image> (1) 'crop season' for each crop, shall mean the period up to harvesting of the crops raised, as deter
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meaning assigned to them below:
<image>
(1) 'crop season' for each crop, shall mean the period up to harvesting of the
crops raised, as determined by the State Level Bankers' Committee
(SLBC) in each State;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning assigned to them below: <image> (1) 'crop season' for each crop, shall mean the period up to harvesting of the crops raised, as deter

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean crops with crop season longer than one year
controls.control_description:
(2) 'long duration crops' shall mean crops with crop season longer than one
year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean crops with crop season longer than one year

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean an asset where loss has been identified by a bank or auditor or the reserve bank or the inspection conducted by nabard, but the amount has not be
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean an asset where loss has been identified by a bank or auditor or the reserve bank or the inspection conducted by nabard, but the amount has not be

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean an asset, including a leased asset, which has ceased to generate income for a bank
controls.control_description:
(4) 'non-performing asset' shall mean an asset, including a leased asset,
which has ceased to generate income for a bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean an asset, including a leased asset, which has ceased to generate income for a bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as 'out of order' if any of the following conditions are satisfied: explanation 1: 'previous 90 days period' referred to in (iii) above sha
controls.control_description:
(5) 'out of order status' - a cash credit / overdraft (CC / OD) account shall be
treated as 'out of order' if any of the following conditions are satisfied:
Explanation 1: 'Previous 90 days period' referred to in (iii) above
shall be inclusive of the day for which the day-end process is being
run.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as 'out of order' if any of the following conditions are satisfied: explanation 1: 'previous 90 days period' referred to in (iii) above sha

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all credit products being offered as an overdraft facility, including those not meant for business purpose and / or which entail inte
controls.control_description:
Explanation 2: The definition of 'out of order' shall be applicable to
all credit products being offered as an overdraft facility, including
those not meant for business purpose and / or which entail interest
repayments as the only credits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all credit products being offered as an overdraft facility, including those not meant for business purpose and / or which entail inte

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as 'overdue' if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the bank
controls.control_description:
(6) 'overdue' status - any amount due to a bank under any credit facility shall
be treated as 'overdue' if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as 'overdue' if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans sanctioned on or after december 31, 2021: (1) the exact due dates for repayment of a lo
controls.control_description:
A bank shall comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans
sanctioned on or after December 31, 2021:
(1) The exact due dates for repayment of a loan, frequency of repayment,
breakup between principal and interest, examples of dates of
classification as special mention account (SMA) / non-performing asset
(NPA), etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans sanctioned on or after december 31, 2021: (1) the exact due dates for repayment of a lo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly specified in the loan agreement
controls.control_description: shall be clearly specified in the loan agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly specified in the loan agreement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be apprised of the same at the time of loan sanction and also at the time of subsequent changes
controls.control_description:
(2) The borrower shall be apprised of the same at the time of loan sanction
and also at the time of subsequent changes, if any, to the sanction terms
/ loan agreement till full repayment of the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be apprised of the same at the time of loan sanction and also at the time of subsequent changes

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be specified in the loan agreements
controls.control_description:
(3) In cases of loan facilities with moratorium on payment of principal and /
or interest, the exact date of commencement of repayment shall also be
specified in the loan agreements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be specified in the loan agreements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured as and when such loans become due for renewal/review
controls.control_description:
In case of loans sanctioned before December 31, 2021, compliance to the
instructions in paragraph 8 shall be ensured as and when such loans become
due for renewal/review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured as and when such loans become due for renewal/review

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish appropriate internal systems to eliminate the tendency to delay or postpone the identification of npas, especially in respect of high value
controls.control_description:
A bank should establish appropriate internal systems to eliminate the tendency
to delay or postpone the identification of NPAs, especially in respect of high value
accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish appropriate internal systems to eliminate the tendency to delay or postpone the identification of npas, especially in respect of high value

controls.control_objective: To ensure flag a borrower account as overdue
controls.control_description:
A bank shall flag a borrower account as overdue, if so, as part of their day-end
processes for the due date, irrespective of the time of running such processes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to flag a borrower account as overdue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done as part of day-end process for the relevant date and the sma or npa classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end proce
controls.control_description:
Similarly, classification of borrower accounts as SMA as well as NPA shall be
done as part of day-end process for the relevant date and the SMA or NPA
classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end process is
run.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done as part of day-end process for the relevant date and the sma or npa classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end proce

controls.control_objective: To ensure reflect the asset classification status of an account at the day-end of that calendar date
controls.control_description:
Thus, the date of SMA / NPA shall reflect the asset classification status of an
account at the day-end of that calendar date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reflect the asset classification status of an account at the day-end of that calendar date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be march 31, 2021
controls.control_description:
Illustration I:
If due date of a loan account is March 31, 2021, and full dues are
not received before the bank runs the day-end process for this date, the date of
overdue shall be March 31, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be march 31, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure get tagged as sma-1 upon running day-end process on april 30, 2021 i
controls.control_description:
If it continues to remain overdue, then this
<image>
account shall get tagged as SMA-1 upon running day-end process on April 30,
2021 i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to get tagged as sma-1 upon running day-end process on april 30, 2021 i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be april 30, 2021
controls.control_description:
Accordingly,
the date of SMA-1 classification for that account shall be April 30, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be april 30, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure get tagged as sma- 2 upon running day-end process on may 30, 2021 and if continues to remain overdue further, it shall get classified as npa upon runn
controls.control_description:
Similarly, if the account continues to remain overdue, it shall get tagged as SMA-
2 upon running day-end process on May 30, 2021 and if continues to remain
overdue further, it shall get classified as NPA upon running day-end process on
June 29, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to get tagged as sma- 2 upon running day-end process on may 30, 2021 and if continues to remain overdue further, it shall get classified as npa upon runn

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement the following instructions to increasing awareness among the borrowers: (1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining
controls.control_description:
A bank shall implement the following instructions to increasing awareness among
the borrowers:
(1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining with
examples, the concepts of date of overdue, special mention account and
non-performing asset classification and upgradation, with specific
reference to day-end process;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement the following instructions to increasing awareness among the borrowers: (1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining

controls.control_objective: To ensure of posters and / or other appropriate media
controls.control_description:
(2) consider displaying such consumer education literature in its branches
by means of posters and / or other appropriate media;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to of posters and / or other appropriate media

controls.control_objective: To ensure make suitable disclosures in its notes to accounts as per the requirements contained in the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - financia
controls.control_description:
A bank shall make suitable disclosures in its Notes to Accounts as per the
requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks
- Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make suitable disclosures in its notes to accounts as per the requirements contained in the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - financia

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify a loan or an advance as a standard asset or a non- performing asset, as the case may be
controls.control_description:
A bank shall classify a loan or an advance as a standard asset or a non-
performing asset, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify a loan or an advance as a standard asset or a non- performing asset, as the case may be

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify a loan or an advance as non-performing asset (npa) if any of the following conditions are satisfied: (1) interest and / or instalment of prin
controls.control_description:
A bank shall classify a loan or an advance as non-performing asset (NPA) if any
of the following conditions are satisfied:
(1) interest and / or instalment of principal remain overdue for a period of
more than 90 days in respect of a term loan;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify a loan or an advance as non-performing asset (npa) if any of the following conditions are satisfied: (1) interest and / or instalment of prin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable only to the following agricultural advances: (1) short-term loans for raising crops i
controls.control_description:
The asset classification norms specified at sub-paragraphs 17(5) and 17(6) shall
be applicable only to the following agricultural advances:
(1) Short-term loans for raising crops i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable only to the following agricultural advances: (1) short-term loans for raising crops i

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that while granting agricultural loans and advances, realistic repayment schedules are fixed on the basis of cash flows / liquidity with the bo
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that while granting agricultural loans and advances, realistic
repayment schedules are fixed on the basis of cash flows / liquidity with the
borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that while granting agricultural loans and advances, realistic repayment schedules are fixed on the basis of cash flows / liquidity with the bo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered for determining npas
controls.control_description:
Subsequent developments should not
be considered for determining NPAs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered for determining npas

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account for the purpose of treating an advance as npa or otherwise
controls.control_description:
The availability of security or net worth of borrower / guarantor should not be
taken into account for the purpose of treating an advance as NPA or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account for the purpose of treating an advance as npa or otherwise

controls.control_objective: To ensure be handled with care and without scope for subjectivity
controls.control_description:
The asset classification of borrowal accounts where a solitary or a few credits are
recorded before the balance sheet date should be handled with care and without
scope for subjectivity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be handled with care and without scope for subjectivity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as a npa
controls.control_description:
Where the account indicates inherent weakness on the
basis of the data available, the account should be deemed as a NPA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as a npa

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish satisfactory evidence to the statutory auditors / inspecting officers about the manner of regularisation of the account to eliminate doubts on
controls.control_description:
In other
genuine cases, the bank must furnish satisfactory evidence to the Statutory
Auditors / Inspecting Officers about the manner of regularisation of the account
to eliminate doubts on their performing status.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish satisfactory evidence to the statutory auditors / inspecting officers about the manner of regularisation of the account to eliminate doubts on

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as overdue (npa) when there is a default in repayment of principal on due date of payment and overdue criteria will be the basis for cla
controls.control_description:
Similarly, in the case of housing loans or similar advances granted to staff
members where interest is payable after recovery of principal, such loans should
be classified as overdue (NPA) when there is a default in repayment of principal
on due date of payment and overdue criteria will be the basis for classification of
assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as overdue (npa) when there is a default in repayment of principal on due date of payment and overdue criteria will be the basis for cla

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as npa and not all the other facilities granted to them
controls.control_description:
In the case of short-term agricultural advances granted by a bank to Central Co-
operative Banks / Primary Agricultural Credit Societies / all other credit societies
under on-lending system respectively for the purpose of on-lending as well as
advances for other purposes, if any, granted under on-lending system, only that
particular facility which became irregular should be treated as NPA and not all the
other facilities granted to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as npa and not all the other facilities granted to them

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify the borrowal accounts according to its own record of recovery
controls.control_description:
In respect of consortium advances a bank shall classify the borrowal accounts
according to its own record of recovery.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify the borrowal accounts according to its own record of recovery

controls.control_objective: To ensure , therefore, arrange to get their share of recovery transferred from the lead bank of the consortium
controls.control_description:
A bank participating in the consortium
should, therefore, arrange to get their share of recovery transferred from the lead
bank of the consortium.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , therefore, arrange to get their share of recovery transferred from the lead bank of the consortium

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as npa / overdue
controls.control_description:
Advances against term deposits, National Saving Certificates (NSCs) eligible for
surrender, Kisan Vikas Patras (KVPs) and life policies may not be classified as
NPA / overdue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as npa / overdue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as npa only when the government repudiates its guarantee when invoked
controls.control_description:
The credit facilities backed by guarantee of the Central Government though
overdue shall be treated as NPA only when the Government repudiates its
guarantee when invoked.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as npa only when the government repudiates its guarantee when invoked

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract asset classification and provisioning norms if interest and / or principal or any other amount due to the bank remains overdue for more than 9
controls.control_description:
State Government guaranteed advances and investments in State Government
guaranteed securities shall attract asset classification and provisioning norms if
interest and / or principal or any other amount due to the bank remains overdue
for more than 90 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract asset classification and provisioning norms if interest and / or principal or any other amount due to the bank remains overdue for more than 9

controls.control_objective: To ensure be retained as such upon implementation
controls.control_description:
If a resolution plan is implemented in adherence to the provisions of Chapter IV-
A of Reserve Bank of India (Rural Cooperative Banks - Resolution of Stressed
Assets) Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, borrower accounts which are
classified as 'Standard' may be retained as such upon implementation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be retained as such upon implementation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded as 'standard', upon implementation of the resolution plan
controls.control_description:
Borrower
accounts which may have slipped into NPA between the date of occurrence of
the calamity and implementation of the resolution plan, shall be upgraded as
'Standard', upon implementation of the resolution plan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded as 'standard', upon implementation of the resolution plan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the criteria laid out in these directions
controls.control_description:
<image>
Provided that after implementation of the resolution plan, the subsequent asset
classification shall be governed by the criteria laid out in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the criteria laid out in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be classified as 'standard'
controls.control_description:
Accounts which are restructured under paragraph 33J to 33R of the Reserve
Bank of India (Rural Cooperative Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets)
Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, where a subsequent restructuring is
necessitated under the provisions of Chapter IV-A of the aforesaid Directions,
shall continue to be classified as 'Standard'.]
C.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be classified as 'standard'

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify non-performing assets further into 'substandard assets', 'doubtful assets' and 'loss assets' categories, as the case may be
controls.control_description:
A bank shall classify non-performing assets further into 'substandard assets',
'doubtful assets' and 'loss assets' categories, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify non-performing assets further into 'substandard assets', 'doubtful assets' and 'loss assets' categories, as the case may be

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done taking into account the degree of well-defined credit weakness and the extent of dependence on collateral security for realisation of dues
controls.control_description:
Classification
of assets into above categories should be done taking into account the degree of
well-defined credit weakness and the extent of dependence on collateral security
for realisation of dues.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done taking into account the degree of well-defined credit weakness and the extent of dependence on collateral security for realisation of dues

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify a npa as sub-standard asset based on the following criteria: (1) an asset which has remained overdue for a period not exceeding three years i
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify a npa as sub-standard asset based on the following criteria: (1) an asset which has remained overdue for a period not exceeding three years i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as sub-standard
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as sub-standard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as sub-standard and should remain so in such category for at least one year of satisfactory performance under the renegotiated or resche
controls.control_description:
(3) an asset, where the terms and conditions of the loans regarding payment
of interest and repayment of principal have been renegotiated or
rescheduled, after commencement of production, should be classified as
sub-standard and should remain so in such category for at least one year
of satisfactory performance under the renegotiated or rescheduled terms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as sub-standard and should remain so in such category for at least one year of satisfactory performance under the renegotiated or resche

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded merely as a result of rescheduling unless there is satisfactory compliance of the above condition
controls.control_description:
The classification of an asset should not be upgraded merely as a result
of rescheduling unless there is satisfactory compliance of the above
condition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded merely as a result of rescheduling unless there is satisfactory compliance of the above condition

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify a npa as doubtful asset based on the following criteria: (1) an asset which has remained overdue for a period exceeding three years in respec
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify a npa as doubtful asset based on the following criteria: (1) an asset which has remained overdue for a period exceeding three years in respec

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as doubtful
controls.control_description:
<image>
(2) in case of all types of term loans, where instalments are overdue for more
than three years, the entire outstanding in term loan should be treated as
doubtful.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as doubtful

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a loss asset, and shall include overdue loans in any one or more of the following cases: (1) decrees or execution petitions have been ti
controls.control_description:
An asset which is considered unrealisable and / or of such little value that its
continuance as a doubtful asset is not worthwhile, shall be treated as a loss asset,
and shall include overdue loans in any one or more of the following cases:
(1) decrees or execution petitions have been time barred or documents are
lost or no other legal proof is available to claim the debt
(2) where the members and their sureties are declared insolvent or have died
leaving no tangible assets,
(3) where the members have left the area of operation of the society leaving
no property and their sureties have also no means to pay the dues
(4) where the loan is fictitious or when gross misutilisation is noticed,
(5) amounts which cannot be recovered in case of liquidated societies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as a loss asset, and shall include overdue loans in any one or more of the following cases: (1) decrees or execution petitions have been ti

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the borrower in whose name the respective loan account with the bank stands
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of sub-paragraph 36(3), the word 'society' shall refer to the
borrower in whose name the respective loan account with the bank stands.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the borrower in whose name the respective loan account with the bank stands

controls.control_objective: To ensure be straightaway classified as doubtful or loss asset as appropriate
controls.control_description:
A NPA need not go through the various stages of classification in cases of serious
credit impairment and such assets should be straightaway classified as doubtful
or loss asset as appropriate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be straightaway classified as doubtful or loss asset as appropriate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be
controls.control_description:
Erosion in the value of security can be reckoned as
significant when the realisable value of the security is less than 50 per cent of the
value assessed by the bank or accepted by the Reserve Bank / NABARD at the
time of last inspection, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be

controls.control_objective: To ensure be straightaway classified under doubtful category and provisioning should be made as applicable to doubtful assets
controls.control_description:
Such NPAs may be straightaway
classified under doubtful category and provisioning should be made as applicable
to doubtful assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be straightaway classified under doubtful category and provisioning should be made as applicable to doubtful assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ignored and the asset should be straightaway classified as loss asset
controls.control_description:
If the realisable value of the security, as assessed by the bank / approved valuers
/ the Reserve Bank / NABARD is less than 10 per cent of the outstanding in the
<image>
borrowal accounts, the existence of security should be ignored and the asset
should be straightaway classified as loss asset.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ignored and the asset should be straightaway classified as loss asset

controls.control_objective: To ensure be either written off or fully provided for by the bank
controls.control_description:
It may be either written off or fully
provided for by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be either written off or fully provided for by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded as 'standard' asset only if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower
controls.control_description:
The loan accounts classified as NPAs may be upgraded as 'standard' asset only
if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded as 'standard' asset only if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded from npa to standard asset category only upon repayment of entire arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit facilitie
controls.control_description:
In case of
borrowers having more than one credit facility from a bank, loan accounts shall
be upgraded from NPA to standard asset category only upon repayment of entire
arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit facilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded from npa to standard asset category only upon repayment of entire arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit facilitie

controls.control_objective: To ensure make provisions of 0
controls.control_description:
A bank shall make provisions of 0.25 per cent of the funded outstanding on a
portfolio basis in respect of direct advances to agricultural and SME sectors which
are standard assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make provisions of 0

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made for sub- standard assets
controls.control_description:
A general provision of ten per cent on total outstanding should be made for sub-
standard assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made for sub- standard assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as follows: (1) 100 per cent of the extent to which the advance is not covered by the realisable value of the security to which the bank has a vali
controls.control_description:
The provisions in respect of doubtful assets shall be as follows:
(1) 100 per cent of the extent to which the advance is not covered by the
realisable value of the security to which the bank has a valid recourse
and the realisable value is estimated on a realistic basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as follows: (1) 100 per cent of the extent to which the advance is not covered by the realisable value of the security to which the bank has a vali

controls.control_objective: To ensure be written off
controls.control_description: In the case of loss assets, the entire assets should be written off.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be written off

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided for
controls.control_description:
If the assets are
permitted to remain in the books for any reason, 100 per cent of the outstandings
should be provided for.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided for

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept in view while making provisions: (1) all agricultural loans may be treated as fully secured as the same are disbursed against charge on land a
controls.control_description:
The following aspects may be kept in view while making provisions:
(1) All agricultural loans may be treated as fully secured as the same are
disbursed against charge on land as provided in the respective State Co-
operative Societies Acts / Rules.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept in view while making provisions: (1) all agricultural loans may be treated as fully secured as the same are disbursed against charge on land a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be estimated on actuarial basis and fully provided for
controls.control_description:
(2) Liabilities towards Provident Fund and Gratuity should be estimated on
actuarial basis and fully provided for.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be estimated on actuarial basis and fully provided for

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assessed and fully provided for as per the existing practice
controls.control_description:
shall be assessed and fully provided for as per the
existing practice.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assessed and fully provided for as per the existing practice

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided for over a period not exceeding four quarters commencing with the quarter in which the fraud has been detected
controls.control_description:
Provisioning Pertaining to Fraud Accounts
(1) The entire amount due to a bank (irrespective of quantum of security held
against such assets), or for which the bank is liable (including in case of
deposit accounts), shall be provided for over a period not exceeding four
quarters commencing with the quarter in which the fraud has been
detected;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided for over a period not exceeding four quarters commencing with the quarter in which the fraud has been detected

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made at once
controls.control_description:
(2) Where there has been delay beyond the prescribed period, in reporting
the fraud to NABARD, the entire provisioning shall be made at once.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made at once

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an additional specific provision of five percent of the outstanding debt in respect of borrowers, for whom a resolution plan has been implemented
controls.control_description:
A bank shall make an additional specific provision of five percent of the
outstanding debt in respect of borrowers, for whom a resolution plan has been
implemented in terms of Chapter IV-A of the Reserve Bank of India (Rural
Cooperative Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an additional specific provision of five percent of the outstanding debt in respect of borrowers, for whom a resolution plan has been implemented

controls.control_objective: To ensure be over and above the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent
controls.control_description:
The
additional specific provisions shall be over and above the applicable prudential
provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be over and above the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure make additional specific provisioning of five per cent of the outstanding debt for each instance of restructuring made under the aforesaid directions
controls.control_description:
For accounts where repeated restructuring is necessitated in terms of Chapter
IV-A of the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Cooperative Banks - Resolution of
Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025, a bank shall make additional specific
provisioning of five per cent of the outstanding debt for each instance of
restructuring made under the aforesaid Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make additional specific provisioning of five per cent of the outstanding debt for each instance of restructuring made under the aforesaid directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be over and above the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent
controls.control_description:
<image>
provisioning shall be over and above the applicable prudential provisions subject
to a ceiling of hundred per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be over and above the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be written back upon the borrower paying at least 20% of the outstanding debt with the bank, without slipping into npa post implementation of the rest
controls.control_description:
The additional specific provisions maintained in terms of paragraph 51A and 51B
above may be written back upon the borrower paying at least 20% of the
outstanding debt with the bank, without slipping into NPA post implementation of
the restructuring, and without being subjected to another restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be written back upon the borrower paying at least 20% of the outstanding debt with the bank, without slipping into npa post implementation of the rest

controls.control_objective: To ensure be tested from the date of rectification of default
controls.control_description:
In case the borrower
defaults during the above period, the conditions for reversal of additional specific
provision, mentioned above, shall be tested from the date of rectification of
default.]
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be tested from the date of rectification of default

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on record of recovery
controls.control_description: 4[The policy on income recognition should be based on record of recovery.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on record of recovery

controls.control_objective: To ensure recognise income, including interest, fee, commission or other income, on accrual basis in respect of credit facilities which are classified as 'stand
controls.control_description:
A bank
may recognise income, including interest, fee, commission or other income, on
accrual basis in respect of credit facilities which are classified as 'Standard',
without the requirement of making any matching provision.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recognise income, including interest, fee, commission or other income, on accrual basis in respect of credit facilities which are classified as 'stand

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognized on actual receipt basis i
controls.control_description:
For credit facilities
which are not classified as 'Standard', including those guaranteed by
Government, income shall be recognized on actual receipt basis i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognized on actual receipt basis i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised on an accrual basis over the period of time covered by the renegotiated or rescheduled extension of credit
controls.control_description:
Fees and commission earned by a bank as a result of renegotiation or
rescheduling of outstanding debts should be recognised on an accrual basis over
the period of time covered by the renegotiated or rescheduled extension of credit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised on an accrual basis over the period of time covered by the renegotiated or rescheduled extension of credit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed if the same is not realised]
controls.control_description:
10[If any credit facility, including bills purchased and discounted, as well as those
guaranteed by Government, becomes NPA, the entire interest, fees, commission

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken to income account provided the credits in the accounts towards interest are not out of fresh / additional credit facilities sanctioned to the
controls.control_description:
Interest realised on NPAs may be taken to income account provided the credits
in the accounts towards interest are not out of fresh / additional credit facilities
sanctioned to the borrowers concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken to income account provided the credits in the accounts towards interest are not out of fresh / additional credit facilities sanctioned to the

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt the accounting principle and exercise the right of appropriation of recoveries in a uniform and consistent manner
controls.control_description:
In the absence of a clear agreement between the bank and the borrower for the
purpose of appropriation of recoveries in NPAs (i.e., towards principal or interest
due), banks should adopt the accounting principle and exercise the right of
appropriation of recoveries in a uniform and consistent manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt the accounting principle and exercise the right of appropriation of recoveries in a uniform and consistent manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised on accrual basis for accounts which continue to be classified as 'standard'
controls.control_description:
In cases of loans where moratorium has been granted for repayment of interest,
income may be recognised on accrual basis for accounts which continue to be
classified as 'standard'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised on accrual basis for accounts which continue to be classified as 'standard'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be evaluated against the definition of 'restructuring' provided in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - resolution of stressed assets) direct
controls.control_description:
This shall be evaluated against the definition of
'restructuring' provided in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be evaluated against the definition of 'restructuring' provided in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - resolution of stressed assets) direct

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on accrual basis
controls.control_description:
Interest income recognition in respect of borrower accounts where resolution
plan has been implemented in terms of Chapter IV-A of the Reserve Bank of India
(Rural Cooperative Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025
dated November 28, 2025, shall be on accrual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on accrual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognized on cash basis
controls.control_description:
For accounts specified at paragraph 32B of these Directions, interest income shall
be recognized on cash basis.]
11 Inserted with effect from July 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Rural Cooperative Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognized on cash basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed vide any of the directions,
instructions, and guidelines listed in the above notification shall continue to
remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue
necessary clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the
interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall
be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
